architecture.name: SecureTrade Financial Platform
architecture.description: Production-grade multi-cloud financial services platform supporting real-time trading, risk management, regulatory reporting, and settlement operations across GCP (primary) and AWS (DR/failover), with Cloudflare edge compute and strict PCI-DSS/SOX/FINRA compliance boundaries

components.name: Next.js 14 SPA (Trading Dashboard)
components.technology: Next.js 14.2, React 18.3, TypeScript 5.4, TailwindCSS 3.4
components.notes: Real-time trading UI with WebSocket price feeds, order entry forms, portfolio dashboard, and compliance disclosures

components.name: Cloudflare Workers (Edge Compute)
components.technology: Cloudflare Workers (V8 isolates), Cloudflare Pages, Edge Cache
components.notes: JWT validation at edge, geo-based routing, regulatory jurisdiction checks, DDoS mitigation, rate limiting per user/IP

components.name: Cloudflare WAF + DDoS Protection
components.technology: Cloudflare WAF (OWASP CRS 4.0), Magic Transit, Bot Management Enterprise
components.notes: Layer 3/4/7 DDoS protection, OWASP top-10 rule sets, financial sector threat intelligence feeds, IP reputation blocking

components.name: Cloudflare DNS + Load Balancing
components.technology: Cloudflare DNS (DNSSEC), Cloudflare Load Balancing with health checks
components.notes: Anycast DNS with DNSSEC, active-active GCP/AWS failover, sub-second health check failover for trading continuity

components.name: GCP External Application Load Balancer
components.technology: GCP Cloud Load Balancing (HTTP/2, gRPC), SSL Policies (TLS 1.3)
components.notes: Global anycast, SSL termination with FIPS 140-2 compliant ciphers, custom SSL policy enforcing TLS 1.2+

components.name: GCP API Gateway (Apigee X)
components.technology: Google Apigee X, OpenAPI 3.1, OAuth 2.0 / JWT RS256
components.notes: API versioning, JWT validation, request/response transformation, developer portal, API analytics, quota management

components.name: GKE Autopilot Cluster (Primary)
components.technology: GKE Autopilot 1.29, Kubernetes 1.29, Workload Identity, Binary Authorization
components.notes: Primary compute plane; workload identity for pod-level GCP IAM, binary authorization policy enforced, node auto-provisioning, Shielded GKE nodes

components.name: EKS Cluster (DR/Failover)
components.technology: AWS EKS 1.29, Kubernetes 1.29, IRSA, Karpenter 0.35
components.notes: Passive DR cluster in AWS us-east-1; Karpenter for node provisioning; IRSA for pod-level AWS IAM; warm standby for <5min RTO

components.name: Istio Service Mesh
components.technology: Istio 1.21 (mTLS STRICT mode), Envoy 1.29, SPIFFE/SPIRE SVIDs
components.notes: mTLS enforced for all east-west traffic, SPIFFE identity for services, traffic policy enforcement, circuit breaking, retries with jitter

components.name: Trading Engine
components.technology: Java 21 (Virtual Threads), Spring Boot 3.2.4, Disruptor 4.0 (LMAX)
components.notes: Core order matching engine; LMAX Disruptor for sub-microsecond order processing; FIX 4.4/5.0 protocol support; SOX audit trail for all trades

components.name: Risk Calculation Service
components.technology: Python 3.12, NumPy 1.26, Pandas 2.2, SciPy 1.12, FastAPI 0.110
components.notes: Real-time VaR (Value at Risk), Greeks calculation, margin requirement computation, portfolio stress testing; GPU-accelerated Monte Carlo

components.name: Market Data Service
components.technology: Go 1.22, gRPC 1.62, WebSocket, Protocol Buffers 3
components.notes: Real-time market data distribution (L1/L2/L3 order book), Bloomberg/Reuters feed normalization, sub-millisecond fan-out to trading engine

components.name: Account Service
components.technology: Java 21, Spring Boot 3.2.4, Spring Security 6.2
components.notes: Account lifecycle management, balance tracking, position management, GLBA-regulated customer financial data; encrypted PII at field level

components.name: Transaction Service
components.technology: Java 21, Spring Boot 3.2.4, JTA (distributed transactions)
components.notes: Payment card processing, ACH/wire transfers, PCI CDE boundary service; tokenizes PAN data via Cloud KMS; all transactions ACID-compliant

components.name: KYC/AML Service
components.technology: Python 3.12, FastAPI 0.110, scikit-learn 1.4, watchdog libraries
components.notes: FINRA-regulated KYC onboarding, OFAC/FinCEN sanctions screening, AML transaction monitoring, SAR filing workflow, 5-year retention required

components.name: Settlement Service
components.technology: Java 21, Spring Boot 3.2.4, ISO 20022 messaging
components.notes: T+1 settlement processing (SEC Rule compliance), DTCC connectivity, ISO 20022 pacs.008/pacs.009 message generation, DvP settlement

components.name: Audit Trail Service
components.technology: Go 1.22, gRPC 1.62, append-only event log, WORM storage
components.notes: SOX-regulated immutable audit trail for all financial transactions; cryptographic hash chaining; 7-year retention; tamper-evident log entries

components.name: Fraud Detection ML
components.technology: Python 3.12, TensorFlow 2.16, Vertex AI, Feature Store
components.notes: Real-time transaction fraud scoring (<10ms), GNN-based account behavior analysis, anomaly detection, model versioning with A/B testing

components.name: Auth / Identity Service
components.technology: Java 21, Spring Security 6.2, OAuth 2.1, PKCE, FIDO2/WebAuthn
components.notes: FIDO2 passwordless auth for traders, step-up MFA for high-value transactions, OAuth 2.1 with PKCE, session management with anomaly detection

components.name: Notification Service
components.technology: Python 3.12, FastAPI 0.110, Twilio SDK, SendGrid API
components.notes: Trade confirmations, margin calls, regulatory alerts, OTP delivery; GLBA-compliant communication records with 3-year retention

components.name: Reporting Service
components.technology: Python 3.12, FastAPI 0.110, Apache Arrow, DuckDB 0.10
components.notes: Regulatory reporting (FINRA TRACE, SEC EDGAR, MiFID II), SOX financial controls reporting, CFTC swap data reporting

components.name: Cloud Spanner (Global Transactions)
components.technology: Google Cloud Spanner (multi-region: nam6), TrueTime, ACID
components.notes: Globally distributed, externally consistent transactions; account balances, positions, trade records; 99.999% SLA; Point-in-time recovery enabled

components.name: AlloyDB (Analytics)
components.technology: Google AlloyDB for PostgreSQL 15 (columnar engine), pgvector 0.6
components.notes: HTAP workloads: real-time analytics on trade data, risk metrics, P&L attribution; columnar engine for OLAP queries; vector search for ML features

components.name: BigQuery (Regulatory Reporting)
components.technology: Google BigQuery (multi-region), BigQuery Omni, BQML
components.notes: Petabyte-scale trade history, SOX financial data warehouse, FINRA/SEC regulatory reporting datasets; column-level security, row-level access policies

components.name: Memorystore Redis Cluster
components.technology: Google Cloud Memorystore for Redis 7.2 (cluster mode, TLS)
components.notes: Session cache, real-time risk metrics cache, order book snapshots, rate-limiter counters; 99.9% SLA; in-transit and at-rest encryption

components.name: Cloud KMS (Key Management)
components.technology: Google Cloud KMS (FIPS 140-2 Level 3 HSM), EKM integration
components.notes: PCI-required key hierarchy: KEK, DEK, PAN tokenization keys; HSM-backed for PCI DSS 4.0 Req 3.7; key rotation enforced every 365 days

components.name: Secret Manager (GCP)
components.technology: Google Cloud Secret Manager, CMEK, automatic replication
components.notes: Database credentials, API keys, third-party service credentials; CMEK-encrypted; version management with automatic rotation triggers

components.name: Cloud Pub/Sub (Event Streaming)
components.technology: Google Cloud Pub/Sub (ordering enabled), exactly-once delivery
components.notes: Trade event streaming, risk event propagation, settlement notifications; ordered message delivery for trade sequences; message retention 7 days

components.name: AWS RDS Aurora (DR Replica)
components.technology: AWS Aurora PostgreSQL 16.1 (Global Database, cross-region replica)
components.notes: Warm standby DR replica of Spanner data; RPO <1s via Aurora Global Database; failover RTO <1min; encrypted with AWS KMS CMK

components.name: AWS Secrets Manager (DR)
components.technology: AWS Secrets Manager with cross-region replication
components.notes: DR-site secret store; auto-replication from GCP Secret Manager via sync lambda; ensures DR site can operate independently

components.name: VPC Service Controls
components.technology: GCP VPC Service Controls, Access Context Manager, Service Perimeters
components.notes: Data exfiltration prevention; service perimeters around PCI CDE resources (Spanner, KMS, BigQuery); access levels enforce device trust and identity

components.name: Cloud Armor (DDoS + WAF)
components.technology: Google Cloud Armor Enterprise, reCAPTCHA Enterprise, Adaptive Protection
components.notes: L7 WAF behind GCP LB; pre-configured OWASP rules, SQL injection/XSS protection, adaptive ML-based DDoS mitigation, threat intelligence integration

components.name: Chronicle SIEM + Security Command Center
components.technology: Google Chronicle (Unified SIEM/SOAR), Security Command Center Premium
components.notes: 1-year log retention for SOX; UEBA for insider threat; automated SOAR playbooks for PCI alerts; Security Command Center Premium for compliance posture

components.name: Cloud Monitoring + Trace (Observability)
components.technology: Google Cloud Monitoring, Cloud Trace, Cloud Logging, Grafana 10.3
components.notes: Golden signals dashboards per service, SLO/SLA tracking, distributed tracing for latency analysis, audit log export to BigQuery

components.name: Artifact Registry (Container Images)
components.technology: Google Artifact Registry, Container Analysis (Vulnerability Scanning), Binary Authorization
components.notes: OCI image storage with vulnerability scanning via Container Analysis; Binary Authorization policy: only signed images from trusted attestors deployed

components.name: Bloomberg Terminal Integration
components.technology: Bloomberg BLPAPI 3.23.x, B-PIPE (server-side data), SFTP over TLS
components.notes: Real-time and historical market data, reference data, pricing; dedicated leased line to Bloomberg network; API key + client certificate authentication

components.name: SWIFT Network Gateway
components.technology: SWIFT Alliance Access 7.5, ISO 20022, MT/MX messages, SWIFTNet Link
components.notes: Cross-border payment messaging (MT103, MT202, MX pacs.008), SWIFT CSP compliance required; HSM-backed BIC authentication; dedicated SWIFT IP range

components.name: DTCC Connectivity (Settlement)
components.technology: DTCC Middleware (CTM), SFTP, ISO 15022 messages, SFT API
components.notes: DTC/NSCC settlement instructions, trade confirmation matching via CTM (Central Trade Manager); dedicated DTCC leased line; DTCC member credentials

components.name: FINRA TRACE Reporting Gateway
components.technology: FINRA Web API, TRACE (Trade Reporting and Compliance Engine), FIX 4.4
components.notes: Mandatory real-time trade reporting for fixed income; T+15min reporting window; FINRA member credentials; TLS 1.2+ required by FINRA

components.name: HashiCorp Vault Enterprise
components.technology: HashiCorp Vault Enterprise 1.16, Raft storage, GCP KMS auto-unseal
components.notes: Dynamic secrets for database credentials (60-second TTL), PKI/TLS cert issuance for Istio, transit secrets engine for application-layer encryption

connections.description: Trading Dashboard resolves via Cloudflare DNS with DNSSEC
SPA served via Cloudflare Edge; WebSocket for live price feeds proxied through Workers
Edge Workers route all API traffic through Cloudflare WAF
WAF forwards clean traffic to GCP External ALB
GCP ALB routes through Cloud Armor for L7 WAF inspection
Cloud Armor forwards to Apigee X API Gateway
Apigee routes /auth/* to Auth/Identity Service for token validation
Apigee routes /trading/* to Trading Engine via Istio ingress gateway
Apigee routes /accounts/* to Account Service
Apigee routes /transactions/* to Transaction Service (PCI segment)
Apigee routes /risk/* to Risk Calculation Service
Apigee routes /reports/* to Reporting Service
GKE Autopilot runs services with Istio mTLS enforced; Binary Authorization validates image signatures
Istio service mesh enforces mTLS for all inter-service communication in GKE
Trading Engine subscribes to Market Data Service via high-throughput gRPC streaming
Trading Engine writes executed trades to Cloud Spanner with distributed ACID transactions
Trading Engine publishes trade events to Cloud Pub/Sub for downstream consumption
Trading Engine calls Audit Trail Service synchronously for SOX-required trade audit records
Risk Calculation Service reads positions and trade data from Cloud Spanner
Risk Calculation Service writes computed risk metrics to AlloyDB analytics store
Risk Calculation Service caches real-time VaR and Greeks in Memorystore Redis
Market Data Service connects to Bloomberg B-PIPE for real-time L1/L2 data
Account Service reads/writes account balances and positions in Cloud Spanner
Account Service encrypts customer PII fields using Cloud KMS DEK
Transaction Service writes payment records to Cloud Spanner (PCI CDE partition)
Transaction Service tokenizes PAN data via Cloud KMS (PCI DSS Req 3.5)
Transaction Service submits transactions to Fraud Detection ML for real-time scoring
Transaction Service sends cross-border payment instructions via SWIFT gateway
KYC/AML Service reads customer transaction history from Spanner for AML pattern analysis
KYC/AML Service writes SAR (Suspicious Activity Reports) to BigQuery for FINRA reporting
Settlement Service reads settled trade records from Spanner
Settlement Service sends DTC settlement instructions to DTCC
Settlement Service records all settlement events in immutable SOX Audit Trail
Audit Trail Service streams all audit events to BigQuery WORM dataset for SOX 7-year retention
Fraud Detection ML reads behavioral feature cache from Memorystore Redis
Auth Service stores session tokens and PKCE challenges in Memorystore Redis
Auth Service uses Vault PKI for short-lived TLS certificate issuance
Notification Service subscribes to trade confirmation events from Pub/Sub
Reporting Service reads trade history from BigQuery for regulatory report generation
Reporting Service submits real-time trade reports to FINRA TRACE within T+15min window
Cloud Spanner replicates to AWS Aurora via Datastream CDC pipeline for DR
Pub/Sub pushes all transaction events to KYC/AML Service for AML monitoring
VPC Service Controls enforces data perimeter around Spanner, preventing exfiltration
VPC Service Controls enforces data perimeter around Cloud KMS keys
Chronicle SIEM exports security events to BigQuery for compliance correlation analysis
Vault issues dynamic database credentials (60s TTL) to Transaction Service
Vault issues dynamic Spanner credentials and PKI certs to Trading Engine

trust_boundaries.name: Internet (Untrusted) -> Edge / CDN
controls: TLS 1.3 enforced end-to-end (TLS 1.2 minimum fallback)
DNSSEC on all public DNS records
Cloudflare Bot Management Enterprise (ML-based bot scoring)
DDoS protection: Layer 3/4 Magic Transit + Layer 7 WAF
OWASP CRS 4.0 managed ruleset with financial-sector custom rules
Geo-blocking for restricted jurisdictions (OFAC countries)
IP reputation blocklists (threat intelligence feeds)
Rate limiting: 100 req/s per user, 10 req/s for auth endpoints
HSTS preloading with max-age=63072000

trust_boundaries.name: Edge / CDN -> GCP Application Tier (DMZ -> Private VPC)
controls: GCP Cloud Armor L7 WAF with adaptive protection
Private GKE cluster (nodes not publicly accessible)
VPC firewall rules: deny-all-ingress default, allow only from LB
GCP VPC flow logs enabled on all subnets
Apigee X mutual TLS for backend service authentication
JWT RS256 validation at Apigee before any backend call
Identity-Aware Proxy (IAP) for administrative access
Cloud NAT for controlled egress (no public IPs on nodes)

trust_boundaries.name: Application Tier -> Data Tier (Compute -> Storage)
controls: GKE Workload Identity: per-service GCP IAM bindings (least privilege)
Cloud Spanner IAM: roles/spanner.databaseUser per service account
AlloyDB: IAM authentication, no password-based access
All connections TLS 1.2+ in transit (Spanner client library enforced)
All data at rest AES-256 encrypted (CMEK via Cloud KMS)
BigQuery column-level security (PII columns restricted by IAM conditions)
BigQuery row-level access policies for multi-tenant isolation
Memorystore Redis: AUTH token + TLS in-transit encryption
Database audit logging to Cloud Logging (all DDL and privileged DML)
VPC Service Controls perimeter prevents data exfiltration to unauthorized services

trust_boundaries.name: PCI CDE (Cardholder Data Environment) Boundary
controls: Dedicated GKE node pools with taint 'pci-cde=true:NoSchedule'
Dedicated subnets with stricter VPC firewall rules
Cloud KMS HSM-backed keys (FIPS 140-2 Level 3) for PAN tokenization
PAN data tokenized at entry point; raw PAN never logged
HashiCorp Vault dynamic secrets: 60-second TTL database credentials
Enhanced audit logging: all access to PCI data logged and alerted
Network segmentation: no direct path from non-PCI to PCI CDE subnets
Quarterly pen testing required (PCI DSS 4.0 Req 11.4)
File integrity monitoring on all CDE container images
Dedicated Pub/Sub topics with CMEK for PCI event streams
PCI-scoped service accounts cannot access non-CDE Spanner instances

trust_boundaries.name: Compliance Zone (SOX / FINRA Regulated Services)
controls: Audit Trail Service: append-only Pub/Sub topics (no delete permissions)
BigQuery SOX dataset: table expiry disabled, WORM-equivalent via IAM
BigQuery SOX dataset: Delete operations blocked via IAM deny policies
Audit records include: user identity, timestamp (TrueTime), action, resource, outcome
Cryptographic hash chaining on audit log entries (tamper evidence)
7-year retention enforced via GCS Object Hold on archived audit exports
SOX data access requires dual-approval change management (CAB process)
FINRA TRACE reporting latency monitored (<15min SLA with alerting)
Read-only access for auditors via dedicated service accounts
Quarterly SOX controls testing documented in Security Command Center

trust_boundaries.name: External Financial Networks (SWIFT / Bloomberg / DTCC / FINRA)
controls: Dedicated private leased lines to Bloomberg (no public internet path)
SWIFT: dedicated IP ranges allowlisted in VPC firewall, SWIFT CSP compliant
SWIFT: HSM-backed BIC/IBAN authentication; message signing with RSA-2048
DTCC: dedicated SFTP over TLS 1.2; IP allowlisting; certificate pinning
FINRA TRACE: TLS 1.2 minimum; FINRA-issued member certificates
All external financial network traffic logged (source, dest, payload hash, timestamp)
Outbound egress via dedicated Cloud NAT with static IPs (required by Bloomberg/SWIFT)
Message integrity verification: HMAC-SHA256 on all SWIFT/DTCC messages
Network time synchronization (PTP/NTP) for trade timestamp accuracy (<1ms drift)
Circuit breakers on all external financial network connections with fallback queuing

key_controls.req_1_2: VPC Service Controls + GKE network policies enforce CDE network segmentation
key_controls.req_3: Cloud KMS HSM (FIPS 140-2 L3) for PAN encryption; Vault transit secrets engine
key_controls.req_4: TLS 1.3 enforced on all external connections; TLS 1.2 minimum internal
key_controls.req_5: Container image scanning via Artifact Registry; Binary Authorization policy
key_controls.req_6: OWASP CRS 4.0 in Cloudflare WAF + Cloud Armor; quarterly pen testing
key_controls.req_7: GKE Workload Identity + Vault dynamic secrets enforce least-privilege access
key_controls.req_8: FIDO2/WebAuthn MFA for all administrative access; Vault short-lived credentials
key_controls.req_10: Chronicle SIEM: all CDE access logged, 1-year hot retention + 3-year archive
key_controls.req_11: Quarterly internal/external pen tests; weekly automated vulnerability scans
key_controls.req_12: Documented information security policy; annual PCI DSS assessment

key_controls.section_302: CEO/CFO quarterly certification supported by automated control evidence from Chronicle
key_controls.section_404: ITGC controls: change management (CAB), access reviews (quarterly), backup/recovery
key_controls.itgc_change_management: GitOps + Binary Authorization: all production changes require signed commits + policy approval
key_controls.itgc_access_control: Quarterly Workload Identity access reviews; Vault credential lifecycle management
key_controls.itgc_data_integrity: Cloud Spanner TrueTime guarantees for transaction ordering; cryptographic audit chain
key_controls.itgc_backup_recovery: Cloud Spanner PITR (7 days); Aurora Global Database cross-region; 4-hour RTO
key_controls.audit_trail: Audit Trail Service (C017): immutable, hash-chained, 7-year BigQuery WORM retention

key_controls.safeguards_rule: AES-256 encryption at rest (CMEK); TLS 1.3 in transit; field-level encryption for PII
key_controls.privacy_rule: Customer data access logging; opt-out preference management in Account Service
key_controls.pretexting_provisions: FIDO2 MFA required for account access; step-up auth for sensitive operations
key_controls.data_retention: Customer financial records: 5-year retention per GLBA; enforced via BigQuery policies
key_controls.vendor_management: Third-party risk assessments for Bloomberg, SWIFT, DTCC annually

key_controls.rule_4370: BCP/DR: EKS warm standby (RTO <5min), Aurora cross-region replica (RPO <1s)
key_controls.rule_17a_4: WORM-equivalent storage: BigQuery IAM deny delete + GCS Object Hold for 6-year retention
key_controls.rule_17a_3: Trade blotter records in BigQuery with immutable audit trail linkage
key_controls.trace_reporting: FINRA TRACE: T+15min reporting; automated via Reporting Service (C021); SLA monitored
key_controls.aml_program: KYC/AML Service (C015): FinCEN/OFAC screening, SAR filing, transaction monitoring
key_controls.books_records: Electronic records in BigQuery: indexed, searchable, producible within 24h for exam

key_controls.cc1_organization: 16 AI agents + security team documented; annual SOC2 audit with external auditor
key_controls.cc6_logical_access: Workload Identity, Vault dynamic secrets, FIDO2 MFA, quarterly access reviews
key_controls.cc7_system_operations: Chronicle SIEM 24/7 monitoring; automated SOAR playbooks; <15min MTTD for P1
key_controls.cc8_change_management: GitOps (ArgoCD); Binary Authorization; change approval workflow; rollback < 5min
key_controls.a1_availability: 99.99% uptime SLA; multi-cloud active-warm DR; chaos engineering quarterly
key_controls.c1_confidentiality: VPC Service Controls data perimeter; CMEK; column/row-level BigQuery security
key_controls.pi1_processing_integrity: Cloud Spanner TrueTime; idempotent transaction IDs; end-to-end trade reconciliation

high_value_targets: Cloud Spanner (C022): contains all account balances and trade records — primary target for data theft/manipulation
Cloud KMS (C026): compromise allows decryption of all PAN data — critical to protect key hierarchy
Trading Engine (C010): trade manipulation could cause market abuse (spoofing, wash trading) — insider threat risk
SWIFT Gateway (C037): fraudulent SWIFT messages could initiate unauthorized cross-border transfers
Auth Service (C019): account takeover enables unauthorized trading on victim accounts
key_threat_vectors: Supply chain: compromised base container images — mitigated by Binary Authorization + Artifact Registry scanning
Credential theft: service account key exfiltration — mitigated by Workload Identity (no key files) + Vault dynamic creds
Insider threat: privileged access to financial data — mitigated by VPC Service Controls + Chronicle UEBA
API abuse: order manipulation via race conditions — mitigated by Spanner serializable isolation + Istio rate limiting
Market data poisoning: Bloomberg feed injection — mitigated by dedicated leased line + message authentication
assumed_breach_controls: Lateral movement blocked by Istio mTLS STRICT + SPIFFE identities per service
Data exfiltration blocked by VPC Service Controls perimeter (C031)
Privilege escalation detected by Chronicle SIEM + Security Command Center anomaly detection
PAN data unusable without KMS keys (protected by FIPS 140-2 Level 3 HSM)
